disclaimer: Educational content only, not investment advice. Patterns can fail. Always use a stop-loss and consult a SEBI-registered advisor before trading.

levels.method: swing-pivot clustering (3-point rule, volume-weighted) over ~180 trading days

pattern.name: No clear pattern
pattern.description: No recognizable chart pattern right now.

readiness.label: Not in an uptrend — breakouts unreliable here

history.followthrough_label: hit +1R (a risk-defined target, not a fixed %) before the stop, within 10 trading days

entry.trigger: Watch for a close above $84.38 on above-average volume to confirm a breakout.
entry.stop_loss: $80.50 (~-4.6% below the trigger, sized to volatility)

rationale.make_or_break: Holds the $84.38 breakout level on a daily close — a close back below it invalidates the move.

levels.method: swing-pivot clustering (3-point rule, volume-weighted) over ~180 trading days

pattern.name: Ascending Triangle
pattern.description: Price keeps hitting a flat resistance while carving higher lows — buyers stepping in earlier each time. A bullish coil that often resolves upward.

readiness.label: Primed — coiling below resistance in an uptrend
readiness.reliability: Caution: a weak track record — about 10% of its 7 past breakouts followed through.

history.followthrough_label: hit +1R (a risk-defined target, not a fixed %) before the stop, within 10 trading days
